memoryArtifacts.headline: Abigail Reed
memoryArtifacts.description:
Abigail, wife of Stephen Richardson (married 2 JAN 1674/75 in Billerica, Mass.), died at age 60 yrs.

Inscription
Here Lyes y Body of M'rs Abigail Richardson Wife to M'r Stephen Richardson Aged 60 Yea …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Wyman於1659年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本時，她的父親Francis Wyman40歲，母親Abigail Read25歲。她於1674年10月31日與Stephen Richardson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可比勒利卡結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1720年9月17日在她的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abigail Wyman于1659年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本时，她的父亲Francis Wyman40岁，母亲Abigail Read25岁。她于1674年10月31日与Stephen Richardson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可比勒利卡结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1720年9月17日在她的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本。

nameMeanings.name: Wyman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wymund, Wymond (Old English Wīgmund, composed of the elements wīg ‘war’ + mund ‘protection’). In Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, and Norfolk the personal name may be the Old Norse cognate Vigmundr, Vimund.
Americanized form of North German   Weimann  . Compare   Wiman  .
History: John Wyman, from Hertfordshire, England, was one of the founders of Woburn, MA, in 1640.

variants.name: Weyman
meanings: English (Gloucestershire): variant of   Wyman   or   Waitman  .
Americanized form of German Weymann: variant of Weimann .

variants.name: Wiman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Holger, Sten.

Swedish: ornamental name composed of an altered form of the placename element vi (representing either Old Norse vithr ‘forest’ or vé ‘sacred place’) + man ‘man’, or a habitational name for someone from a place called with the element vi.
English: variant of   Wyman  . This form of the surname is virtually non-existing in Britain.

variants.name: Whyman
meanings: English: variant of   Wyman  .

variants.name: Weimann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Wilhelm, Kurt, Fritz, Hans, Helmuth, Juergen, Reinhold.
German:
variant of   Weinmann  .

variants.name: Wayment
meanings: English: variant of Waymont, a variant of Wyman .

variants.name: Wayman
meanings: English: variant of   Wyman   and   Waitman  .
Americanized form of German   Wehmann   and   Weidmann  .

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Wyman was born in 1659, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Francis Wyman, was 40 and her mother, Abigail Read, was 25. She married Stephen Richardson on 31 October 1674, in Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 17 September 1720, in her hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Abigail Wyman est née en 1659, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Francis Wyman, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Abigail Read, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Stephen Richardson le 31 octobre 1674, à Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 septembre 1720, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Abigail Wyman 1659 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Francis Wyman 40 und ihre Mutter Abigail Read 25. Sie hat am 31. Oktober 1674 in Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Stephen Richardson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. September 1720 im Alter von 61 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Wyman è nata il nel 1659 nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Francis Wyman, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Abigail Read, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Stephen Richardson il 31 ottobre 1674, nel Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 17 settembre 1720, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスビラーイカ
ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Wymanが1659年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで生まれた時，父Francis Wymanは40歳，母Abigail Readは25歳であった。1674年10月31日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスビラーイカでStephen Richardsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1720年9月17日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 스톤함
ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 빌레리카
ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Wyman(이)가 1659년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Francis Wyman(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Abigail Read(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1674년 10월 31일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 빌레리카에서 Stephen Richardson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1720년 9월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Wyman nasceu em 1659, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Francis Wyman, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Read, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Stephen Richardson em 31 de outubro de 1674, em Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1720, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Wyman родилась в 1659 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Francis Wyman было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Abigail Read, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephen Richardson 31 октября 1674 г. в местности биллирика, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 17 сентября 1720 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Abigail Wyman nació en 1659, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Francis Wyman, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Abigail Read, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Stephen Richardson el 31 de octubre de 1674, en Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1720, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
